verses.text: Mipilte bek in na a khiatna taktak theithei uh hi. Pilna in mipilte maitaisak a, a hehmai a beisak hi.
Kumpipa' hong sawl bangin gamta in la, Pasian' tungah thu mawk ciampak kei in
Kumpipa in a ut peuhpeuh hih thei ahih manin ama kiang panin paikhia in; ama lungkimlohna hih teitei kei in
Kumpipa aana neihna tawh gamta hi. Ama gen bangin gamta in; kuamah in amah nial zolo hi
Ama thu a mangte in haksatna tuakkha lo ding hi. Mipilte in a gamtatna zia leh a hun hoih thei uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Pasian' Sepna Ziate Mihing' Theihzawh Hilo

verses.text: Na khatpeuh i hih ding ciangin a kilawm hun, leh a ngeina man om a, ahi zongin eite in bangmah i thei kei hi
A hong piang ding thu i thei kei a, a hong gen thei zong kuamah omlo hi
A sih ding a pelhthei, a sih ding hun a phiatthei kuamah omlo hi. Gal a om ciangin gallauna a pelhthei, siatna sungah a lut ciangin a pengthei kuamah omlo hi
Leitunga gamtatnate ka ngaihsut ciangin hih thute ka mukhia hi. Mi khat in midang tungah vangliatna nei-in, a uk sung mite a gimsak gawp hun a om hi
Migilote si-in kivui a, a siat gamtatna khuasunga om mite mah in han panin a ciah ciangun amah a phat vevena uh ka mu hi
A mawhte gim kipia pahpahlo ahih manin mihingte in khialhding haksa salo uh hi
Mawhnei khat in zavei dong siatna bawl napi-in a khan' sau veve hi. Ahi zongin “Pasian a zahtakte-a' dingin thu khempeuh nuam ding hi
Migilote-a' dingin thu nuamlo ding a, amaute in Pasian zahtaklo uh ahih manin a nuntak hun uh nilim bangin beipak ding a, khan'sih ding uh hi,” kici hi

Ahi zongin hih thugenna a mawknapi ahi hi. Leitunga thupiangte ngaihsun dih in: Khat veivei midikte in migilote' gimthuak dingteng thuak zawsop a, migilote in midikte' thaman ngah dingteng ngah zawsop uh hi. Hih thu pen a haivai, a mawkna taktak ahi hi

Tua ahih ciangin mihing in hih leitungah nuam a sak theih ding adang omlo ahih manin an ne tui dawnin nuamsa-in a om ding bek ahi hi. Pasian in hih leitungah nuntak a piak sungteng a sep thaman a ngah theih ding hih bek om hi
Pil ding hahkatin, leitunga thupiangte ka theih ciangin sun leh zanin ihmulo liangin i om hangin
Pasian' nasepna i theihzawh lohna ka phawk hi. Mihingte in bangzahin i hahkat hangin kitheikhia zolo hi. Mipilte in thei a kisak hangun bangmah theilo uh hi.
